name: cloudit-platform
description: CloudIT Platform — Multi-tenant SaaS infrastructure for CloudIT Solutions (Pvt) Ltd

scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules apps/**/node_modules packages/**/node_modules apps/**/dist packages/**/dist apps/**/.next
scripts.e2e:test:admin: cd e2e && npx playwright test --project=chromium tests/admin
scripts.e2e:test:employees: cd e2e && npx playwright test --project=chromium tests/admin/employees.spec.ts
